title: buildah-1.16.1-1.fc32.x86_64 / Error committing the finished image
body:
Hi,
after upgrade to buildah 1.16.1 i cannot commit finished images any more:
Example output:

```
[...]
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob f962f4cd4f6d done  
Copying config e3e8d6ef39 done  
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
error committing container for step {Env:[TZ=Europe/Berlin PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin  TZ=Europe/Berlin] Command:cmd Args:[/bin/sh] Flags:[] Attrs:map[json:true] Message:CMD /bin/sh Original:CMD [ "/bin/sh" ]}: error copying layers and metadata for container "436c26da39cf9dfea62ec6afae9d5e70cbb02a83bd766e34f975db2b6510b109": Error committing the finished image: error adding layer with blob "sha256:f962f4cd4f6df6af4849d03497a6abe1eb14febc5be8639240e8d6419351e187": Error processing tar file(exit status 1): link /vt200 /etc/terminfo/v/vt220: no such file or directory
```

i downgraded to 1.15.1 and all is fine again.
What is the fuss with vt200 here?
Any hints how to solve the problem?

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out!

Please provide more information as requested in the issue template. A reproducer would be hugely beneficial to see what's going on.

Yes, sorry.
Running with buildah-1.16.1-1.fc32.x86_64:
and a fairly simple example:
Dockerfile:
```
FROM alpine:3.7

RUN apk --update add postgresql-client openssh-client curl tzdata && rm -rf  /tmp/* /var/cache/apk/*
# add timezone info (instead of UTC)
ENV TZ="Europe/Berlin"

# ENTRYPOINT [ "psql" ]
CMD [ "/bin/sh" ]
```

```
$ buildah bud --squash -f Dockerfile -t localhost/esb/postgres-client:v1.x .

ERRO exit status 125
```

all this is running in rootless mode on fedora 32
`Linux T470 5.8.9-200.fc32.x86_64 #1 SMP Mon Sep 14 18:28:45 UTC 2020 x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux
`

the same with buildah 1.15.1

```
buildah bud --squash -f Dockerfile -t localhost/esb/postgres-client:v1.x .
STEP 1: FROM alpine:3.7
STEP 2: RUN apk --update add postgresql-client openssh-client curl tzdata && rm -rf  /tmp/* /var/cache/apk/*
fetch http://dl-cdn.alpinelinux.org/alpine/v3.7/main/x86_64/APKINDEX.tar.gz
fetch http://dl-cdn.alpinelinux.org/alpine/v3.7/community/x86_64/APKINDEX.tar.gz

STEP 3: ENV TZ="Europe/Berlin"
STEP 4: CMD [ "/bin/sh" ]
STEP 5: COMMIT localhost/esb/postgres-client:v1.x
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 73526bbe7c24 done  
Copying config ea231264b9 done  
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
--> ea231264b9c
ea231264b9c9b5919a9836c7427580731de8d1071e8cb2f2d9a5fe5ca6be5151
```

and i get the container-image as expected
Hmm, working with 17.0.-dev on F31, it works just fine for me...
and yes, I badly need to upgrade my sandbox vm....

any ideas how to progress?
i upgraded fc32 (incl. testing-repos), still no success: buildah 1.16.1 won't give me images and still complains about vt200.

But, one thing changed right now when building with 1.15: i get an error message when building images with buildah (see also: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/7713)

```
STEP 1: FROM docker.io/library/postgres:12-alpine
STEP 2: RUN apk --update add supervisor tzdata openjdk8 libxml2-utils && rm -rf  /tmp/* /var/cache/apk/*
2020-09-23T09:04:00.000435717Z: unknown seccomp syscall `fchmodat2` ignored
fetch http://dl-cdn.alpinelinux.org/alpine/v3.12/main/x86_64/APKINDEX.tar.gz
fetch http://dl-cdn.alpinelinux.org/alpine/v3.12/community/x86_64/APKINDEX.tar.gz
(1/50) Installing libxml2-utils (2.9.10-r5)
[...]
OK: 257 MiB in 83 packages
STEP 3: ENV TZ="Europe/Berlin"
STEP 4: COPY db_init.sql /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/
STEP 5: COPY supervisord.conf /etc/
STEP 6: COPY run.sh /home/sospos/
STEP 7: COPY runClient.sh /home/sospos/
STEP 8: COPY getAllActiveStudentsFromESB.tar.gz /home/sospos/getAllActiveStudentsFromESB.tar.gz
STEP 9: RUN cd /home/sospos && tar -zxf getAllActiveStudentsFromESB.tar.gz && rm getAllActiveStudentsFromESB.tar.gz
2020-09-23T09:04:05.000513513Z: unknown seccomp syscall `fchmodat2` ignored
STEP 10: ENTRYPOINT ["supervisord", "--nodaemon", "--configuration", "/etc/supervisord.conf"]
STEP 11: COMMIT localhost/esb-client:v1.2
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 25ce6085eb38 done  
Copying config 98258b9c3b done  
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
--> 98258b9c3bc
98258b9c3bc05973aebf6e2991e6068273300d662e9efe9e6e39c87d131ae122
```

The warning about `fchmodat2` not being recognized as a valid syscall name isn't related to the `link /vt200 /etc/terminfo/v/vt220: no such file or directory` error, so we can let that be sorted out elsewhere.

The error copying hard links should have been fixed between v1.16.0 and v1.16.1, and I can reproduce it with the example Dockerfile and buildah-1.16.0-2.fc32 if I add the `--squash` option.  I can still reproduce it when I upgrade to buildah-1.16.1-1.fc32, though, which is _not_ what I expected.  The binary claims it's v1.16.0 when I run `buildah --version`, though, so at this point I'm thinking we made a mistake somewhere in the packaging.

We tagged 1.16.2 yesterday, and the buildah-1.16.2-1.fc32.x86_64 package seems to identify itself as I'd expect it to.  If you grab it from the "BUILDS" link at https://bodhi.fedoraproject.org/updates/FEDORA-2020-e1160edcc9, does it work correctly?

very nice!
```
buildah -v
buildah version 1.16.2 (image-spec 1.0.1-dev, runtime-spec 1.0.2-dev)
```
this is working fine, i get my container-images produced
Thanks for providing the updated version!
